positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for hadid_premise_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u30,axiom,
    ~is_zaha_hadid_style(sK1)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ~is_kelly_wearstler_style(X0) | ~is_zaha_hadid_style(X0)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    zaha_hadid != kelly_wearstler).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    is_kelly_wearstler_style(sK1)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    is_zaha_hadid_style(sK0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define designed_by_style(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define has_interesting_geometries(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define is_brutalist(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define adores_max(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define is_evocative(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define is_dreamy(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
